title: デビュー戦の後に・迷走

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her pre-race jitters, Gold Ship's strides
are strong and free once it's go time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a great sign for future races, and it makes
me even more excited to help Gold Ship set a
goal and stay the course!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Soy beans, soy beans! SOOOY... BEEEAAAAANS!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Are you eating your beans and getting swole on
protein?! Are you?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You are what you eat, and I am built on soy beans!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now show your respect and bow down to the
almighty soy bean!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Good. Now, I'm gonna go whip up today's batch
of soy milk!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Soy beans, soy beans! Soooy beans!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship begins marching away, but I still have
to talk to her about our next goal!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
choice_data_list:
What kind of race would you like to run in
next?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, that came out of nowhere. What are you,
Quirky Questions Quincy?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anything is good, so long as it's hot! ...But not as
hot as curry udon right out of the pot.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Beyond that... I dunno. You're the pro trainer, not
me. Now go get'em, tiger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come out of the conversation with more
questions than answers, but she's already long
gone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using my best judgment, I decide putting her in a
race where she can flaunt her long-distance
aptitude will fire her up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And for that, the Hopeful Stakes sounds like a
good place to start!
